table.title: Table
table.name: Task Name
table.mixedWarning: Mixed calendars — hours/day per calendar: {{list}}. Duration is shown per task in its own unit.

dialog.name: Name
dialog.hourCalendarHint: Hour input requires an hour calendar (working times).

properties.selectPrompt: Select a task to view properties.
properties.name: Name
properties.wbsAutoHint: WBS codes are numbered automatically (Planning → Structure)
properties.scheduleStartHint: Planned anchor date — the calculated start follows from the scheduling logic.
properties.hardPinTip: Only for MSO/MFO — hard-pins the date and overrides the relationship logic (P6 Mandatory).
properties.hardPinHint: A hard pin overrides the relationships: the bar is fixed on the date, even before its predecessors. A violation becomes negative float upstream.

constraintPair.secondary-hard-forbidden: A secondary constraint may not be hard.
constraintPair.no-secondary-with-mandatory-or-on: No secondary constraint with an MSO/MFO or hard pin.
constraintPair.secondary-type-invalid: Secondary type must be a bound (SNET/FNET/SNLT/FNLT).
constraintPair.secondary-same-side: Primary and secondary may not bound the same side.

properties.hammockDerivedHint: Derived duration — the span between the start and finish driver (read-only).
properties.hammockNoFinishDriver: No finish driver (FF/SF) — the span falls back to zero length.
properties.longFreePeriodWarning: This task runs through a {{days}}-day non-working period ({{start}} to {{end}}).
properties.longFreePeriodWarningNamed: This task runs through {{name}} — a {{days}}-day non-working period ({{start}} to {{end}}).

assignments.title: Assignments
assignments.disabledMilestone: Assignments are not possible on milestones.
assignments.disabledSummary: Assignments are not possible on summary tasks.

relations.title: Relations
relations.addFromSelectionHint: Select exactly two tasks (predecessor first, then successor)
relations.empty: No relations yet. Shift-drag between bars in the Gantt, or select two tasks and use the button above.
relations.notCalculated: Recalculate (F5) to see driving and float
relations.warnTruncatedLead: Lead truncated at the project start — the overlap is not fully used
relations.warnLeadExceedsDuration: Lead is larger than the predecessor's duration

structure.title: Codes & fields
structure.activityCodesHint: Freely definable dimensions (e.g. Location, Discipline) for grouping and filtering — at most one value per type per task.
structure.customFieldsHint: Typed user fields shown as columns in the table and editable per task.

externalLinks.readOnlyNote: The source file is read only — it is not opened as a document.
externalLinks.manualHint: No file at hand? Paste the external task's project id and task id.
externalLinks.none: No external links on this task yet.
externalLinks.refreshAllHint: Re-read each referenced source file and update the anchors + outdated status.
externalLinks.sourceMissing: source not loaded — re-import to refresh
externalLinks.pickTaskFirst: Select a single task to add an external link.
externalLinks.noSourcesToast: No refreshable external sources (file path missing).
externalLinks.notAvailableWeb: Reading source files is desktop-only; use the manual fallback.
